text:
Gold medal and Olympic record for Ireland's Daniel Wiffen... what a night for Irish swimming. Barry Murphy joins Mikey Stafford to try and comprehend a phenomenal performance.

Good luck to anyone trying to get their kids into a swimming class for the next 20 years.

Barry really feels Wiffen's win could be transformative, coming so soon after Mona McSharry's bronze, and more medal opportunites later this week.

We hear from the man himself and plot a location for the Daniel Wiffen Swimming Centre.

Mikey also chats to Olympic sailing silver medallist Annalise Murphy about Sean Waddilove and Robert Dickson's progress in Marseille.

Annalise brings us inside the murky world of Olympic sailing and corrects Mikey's many, many mistakes.

We also hail the inland sailing powerhouses of Austria, Carlow and Blessington.

title: What's my name? Daniel Wiffen, Olympic champion!
description: Gold medal and Olympic record for Ireland's Daniel Wiffen... what a night for Irish swimming. Barry Murphy joins Mikey Stafford to try and comprehend a phenomenal performance. And Annalise Murphy explains the dark side of sailing....
